actions.label: TV3 Launch
actions.description: Send MAV_CMD_USER_1 command 31010 with param1=1 to request launch through tv3_mode_manager.

actions.label: TV3 Abort
actions.description: Send MAV_CMD_USER_1 command 31010 with param1=2 to request abort through tv3_mode_manager.

actions.label: TV3 Reset
actions.description: Send MAV_CMD_USER_1 command 31010 with param1=3 to reset tv3_mode_manager to READY when armed.
